changelog: Polish 12.6 a11y first-pass: header burger button is now a real <button> with aria-label/aria-expanded/aria-controls (was a non-focusable <div>); Esc closes the mobile nav; .mobile-menu-btn has a focus-visible ring. Header 'Ещё ▾' dropdown gets full keyboard nav: ArrowDown opens and focuses first item, ArrowUp/ArrowDown step, Home/End jump to first/last, Esc closes and returns focus to the toggle. group-order delete button gets aria-label + title. nav.toggle_menu translation keys added to ru/en/kk locales.
